reference: DON QUIXOTE CONSENTED AND HE TAKING IT WITH BOTH HANDS IN GOOD FAITH AND WITH A BETTER WILL GULPED DOWN AND DRAINED OFF VERY LITTLE LESS THAN HIS MASTER
text: Donkey hooded himself, and he, taking it with both hands, in good faith and with a better will, gulped it down and drained up very little less than his master.
